insight: Master Bot loses to Cynestra strategies partly because GGGB (Plasmafier) is a more resource-convenient color combination than GGGR (Cynestra), suggesting the bot may not optimally adapt its economy to the red requirement that Cynestra demands.
author: velizar_
context: velizar_ half-jokingly noting they lose to Master Bot when going Cynestra after sano712 pointed out GGGB is more convenient than GGGR.
